setup.title: Initial Setup
setup.description: Please enter your basic information for requests. You can change it later in settings.

common.loadError: An error occurred while loading data.

field.distanceKmHint: Distance is auto-calculated when you search departure and destination. Manual entry is also available.
field.itemDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Training meeting meals, site visit lunch

form.title: Payment / Reimbursement Request Form
form.subtitle: Payment / Reimbursement Request Form
form.itemsHint: Please include purpose, headcount, etc. in as much detail as possible
form.draftRestored: Your previous draft has been restored.
form.blockerMessage: Your draft is auto-saved. You can continue when you return.
form.receiptHint: PNG, JPG, PDF only (max 750KB per file)
form.receiptNotRequired: Receipts are not required for car transport only requests.
form.receiptPreview: Receipt preview — verify items and amounts match
form.totalAmountCheck: Please verify that the receipt amounts match the total (₩{{amount}}).
form.routeMapCaptureFailed: {{count}} route map(s) failed to capture (submission continues)
form.vendorRequestHint: Check for vendor payments. Enter vendor payee info manually.
form.vendorBankBookHint: Attach vendor's bank book copy (PNG, JPG, PDF / max 800KB)
form.vendorBankBookExisting: Existing vendor bank book attached. Upload new to replace.
form.bankBookUploadInline: Bank Book (will be saved to your profile)
form.bankBookUploadInlineHint: Attach your bank book. It will be automatically saved to your profile on submission. (PNG, JPG, PDF / max 800KB)
form.signatureInline: Signature (will be saved to your profile)
form.signatureInlineHint: Register your signature. It will be automatically saved to your profile on submission.

validation.itemsRequired: At least one item is required (description and amount).
validation.budgetCodeRequired: Budget code is required for all items.
validation.transportTypeRequired: Please select the transport type for transportation items.
validation.transportDepartureRequired: Please enter the departure for transportation items.
validation.transportDestinationRequired: Please enter the destination for transportation items.
validation.transportDistanceRequired: Please enter the distance for personal car transportation items.
validation.transportTripTypeRequired: Please select the trip type (round/one-way) for transportation items.
validation.signatureRequired: Please sign below or register your signature in your profile.
validation.bankBookRequired: Please upload your bank book below or register it in your profile.
validation.duplicateAmount: A request with the same amount ₩{{amount}} already exists ({{date}}). This might be a duplicate. Continue anyway?
validation.noChanges: No changes detected. Please modify at least one field.
validation.consentRequired: You must agree to the data handling terms.
validation.vendorBankBookRequired: Please attach the vendor's bank book.

consent.title: Data Handling Consent
consent.agreement: This service is not an official web service of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. Your personal information is securely stored in Google's secure storage (Firebase); however, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints bears no responsibility for any loss or exposure of data.
consent.checkboxLabel: I have read and agree to the above terms.

approval.rejectDescription: Please enter the reason for rejection. The applicant will be notified.
approval.selfReviewError: You cannot review your own request.
approval.selfApproveError: You cannot approve your own request.
approval.selfRejectError: You cannot reject your own request.
approval.forceRejectDescription: Please enter the reason for rejection. The applicant will be notified.
approval.resubmitDescription: Edit the rejected request and resubmit. At least one change is required.
approval.rejectedOnly: Only rejected requests can be resubmitted.
approval.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this request?

settlement.title: Settlement
settlement.settleConfirm:
Settle {{count}} requests?
{{payeeCount}} consolidated reports will be generated.
settlement.backToSelectConfirm: Review progress will be lost. Go back?

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.documentNoHint: Document number displayed on settlement reports.

users.title: User Management
users.selfChangeError: You cannot change your own role.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

settings.title: Settings
settings.displayNameHint: Must match the name on your bank book. This name will be displayed on requests and in the app.
settings.bankBookReplaceHint: Upload a new file to replace the existing one.
settings.bankBookRequiredHint: Please upload a bank book copy to submit requests.
settings.signatureHint: This signature will be used for approvals.
settings.committeeHint: This will be the default selection on request forms.

project.title: Project Management
project.name: Project Name
project.directorThresholdHint: Requests above this amount require director, executive, or admin approval.
project.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? You can restore it within 30 days.
project.perKmRateHint: Rate applied per km when calculating personal car transportation costs.

budget.warning: {{percent}}% of the budget has been used. (Warning threshold: {{threshold}}%)
budget.warningThresholdHint: A warning will be shown when budget usage exceeds this percentage.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcome: Hi! Ask me about app usage or expense policies.
chat.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
chat.limitReached: Conversation has reached its maximum length. Please refresh the page to start a new conversation.

checklist.title: Review Guide
checklist.bankBookNameMatches: Name, bank, and account number on bank book match the request
checklist.bankBookCorrect: Bank book copy is up to date
